changes.before: Sylvanas found it. Narrow. High. Good.
changes.after: Sylvanas found it: narrow, high, good.

changes.before: Shelves. Crates. Bench. No corridor.
changes.after: Shelves, crates, a bench. Storage room.

changes.before: Scuffs from harder field boots than this corridor expected.
changes.after: Scuffs from harder field boots than usually came through this corridor.

changes.before: Rooms opened off the corridor in a line. Pantry turned reagent store. Family archive turned records room. Sitting room stripped to stone and worktables.
changes.after: The corridor had been broken into workrooms: a pantry turned reagent store, a family archive turned records room, a sitting room stripped to stone and worktables.

changes.before: Hurt pride.
After twenty steps the last pretense of manor went out of the place.
changes.after: After twenty steps, the manor disguise gave way to the crypt.

changes.before: No chains. No circle. No visible force.
changes.after: Nothing visible held her there: no chains, no circle, no force.

changes.before: Jaina caught the read land. One beat of stillness. One small failure to speak quickly enough.
changes.after: Jaina caught the read land. One beat of stillness.

changes.before: Honest. That honesty hurt worse than a sneer would have.
changes.after: Honest. The plainness of it hit harder than a sneer.

changes.before: But the new gap lived in it.
changes.after: But Jaina still left extra room in it.

changes.before: He had expected death the way another man expected weather.
changes.after: He looked at it without surprise.

changes.before: The cold cup and worked pages said how long the conversation had lasted.
changes.after: The cold cup and worked pages showed how long the conversation had lasted.

changes.before: Straight to the point. Useful first. No defense.
Kel'Thuzad's death left the place running on habit.
changes.after: With Kel'Thuzad dead, the wards and routines kept cycling on their own.

changes.before: Jaina knew. She said nothing.
Jaina landed light, but the room's careful stiffness was back in every joint.
changes.after: Jaina landed light, but every joint had gone careful and rigid again.

changes.before: The return crossing took less time. The question had changed; no one wondered now whether they were reaching the island or leaving it.
changes.after: The return crossing took less time. Everyone faced shore.

changes.before: There it was. The next fire waiting open-mouthed.
changes.after: There it was. The next fire was already ahead of them.

changes.before: There it was. The next fire waiting open-mouthed.
changes.after: There it was. The next fire was already ahead of them.

changes.before: Short. Clean. No chalkboard in the voice now.
Ahead the south road ran through contaminated dark toward a city that might already be eating its own dead.
changes.after: Ahead the south road ran through contaminated dark toward a city whose people might already be eating their own dead.
